name: insurance brokers processing 10-20 policies/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 10-20 policies/month, inefficient data handling causes delayed quotes. We provide streamlined policy aggregation instead of manual data entry and analysis using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in aggregating and analyzing multiple insurance policy data efficiently.
